quoted_tweet.text:
🌊: Hey hey hey I’m Jiang Heng. Can you hear me?
🌲: Aiya don’t be so fierce I’m Li Peien. Can you hear me clearly?

🌊: You took so long to pick up. Don’t tell me you forgot about our early May date?
🌲: No way ~ We’ve been preparing for this meeting for a long time right Lele? ( we can hear Lele barking here😭😭😭)

🌊: Some people have been struggling over their outfit for days.
🌲: Haha what do you think about how things looked last time?

🌊: Whatever you wear looks good on you. Pair it with Nexxus black gold bottle and its faint magnolia scent and it feels even better.
🌲: You don’t even need to say that~ I’m going to get ready now. See you then.

🌊: See you in early May. You must come.

(Sorry if i mistook 🌲🌊with each other hahahah their voices sound damn similar already 😮‍💨)
